title: Designer portfolio refresh
requirement: Need a clean portfolio website for my design studio with case studies and a contact form.

title: Clinic landing site
requirement: Need a website for a dental clinic in Mumbai with treatment pages, testimonials, appointment lead form, and WhatsApp click-to-chat. Budget under Rs 1.8 lakh. Launch in 5 weeks. One admin editor.

clarificationAnswers.compliance_constraints: No regulated patient data will be stored online

title: Boutique hotel website
requirement: Need a boutique hotel website with room pages, gallery, blog, and inquiry form. No direct booking engine for now. Launch before June 15. Budget around $4,000. 2 staff users. UK market.

title: Consultant authority site
requirement: Need a website for my consulting business.

title: Restaurant website
requirement: Need a restaurant website with menu, reservations inquiry, event pages, and Instagram feed embed for a Pune restaurant. Budget Rs 90,000. Launch in 3 weeks. One manager and one staff user.

title: Salon booking app
requirement: Need a salon booking app with service list, staff calendar, online payments, and reminder messages for customers.

title: Physiotherapy booking portal
requirement: Need a patient booking portal for a physiotherapy clinic with therapist calendars, intake forms, online payments, and email reminders. Budget $7k-$9k. Launch in 10 weeks. 3 clinicians and 2 front-desk staff. US market. Around 400 reminders per month. HIPAA review required.

title: Tutor session scheduler
requirement: Need a booking system for online tutoring sessions with Zoom links and reminder emails.

title: Visa consultancy appointments
requirement: Need an appointment booking site for a visa consultancy with consultant slots, document checklist download, and lead capture. Budget about $3,500. Need launch in 5 weeks. 4 staff users. UAE market.

clarificationAnswers.payment_flow: No online payments in phase one

title: Rental demo booking
requirement: Need a demo booking flow for industrial equipment rentals with lead capture, sales-team calendar, and SMS reminders. Budget Rs 4 lakh. Need a pilot in 7 weeks. 1 admin and 8 sales reps. India market. Around 1200 SMS reminders per month.

clarificationAnswers.payment_flow: No online checkout in the pilot

title: Artisan goods marketplace
requirement: Need a marketplace for handmade goods with vendor onboarding, product listings, cart, payouts, and admin moderation.

title: Used equipment marketplace
requirement: Need a B2B marketplace for used manufacturing equipment with listing approvals, inquiry flow, and escrow-style payments. Budget $22k. Need first release in Q3. 5 admin users. US and Canada market.

title: Niche job board
requirement: Need a job board for remote design roles with employer accounts, paid job posts, and admin moderation. Budget $8k-$10k. Need launch in 9 weeks. 3 admins. UK market.

clarificationAnswers.payment_flow: Employers pay one-time listing fees online

title: B2B leads exchange
requirement: Need a platform where logistics companies can buy verified freight leads. Need company accounts, wallet recharge, lead access controls, and admin review.

clarificationAnswers.user_scope: 4 admins and up to 200 company accounts
clarificationAnswers.payment_flow: Wallet recharge and prepaid lead credits

title: Tutoring marketplace
requirement: Need a tutoring marketplace where parents can find tutors, book trial calls, and manage package payments. Budget $15k. Need launch in 14 weeks. UK market. 2 admins and 60 tutors.

clarificationAnswers.payment_flow: Parents buy packages online and tutors are paid offline at first
clarificationAnswers.notification_volume: About 700 email reminders and booking notifications per month

title: Sales reporting dashboard
requirement: Need a dashboard that shows sales KPIs, lead funnels, and rep performance by region. Budget Rs 3 lakh. Need rollout in 6 weeks. 1 admin and 12 sales managers. India only.

title: Warehouse operations panel
requirement: Need an internal dashboard for warehouse supervisors to track inbound loads, dispatch status, and exceptions. Budget $9k. Need launch in 8 weeks. 20 internal users. US market.

title: School admin dashboard
requirement: Need a school admin dashboard for attendance, fee status, and teacher announcements.

clarificationAnswers.payment_flow: Fee status visibility only, no online payments in this phase

title: Creator analytics portal
requirement: Need a dashboard for creators to see campaign metrics, earnings, and invoice status. Budget $5k. Need launch in 7 weeks. 2 admins and 100 creator accounts. Europe market.

title: Field service dashboard
requirement: Need a dashboard for a home maintenance company to manage jobs, technicians, and daily status updates with WhatsApp alerts. Budget Rs 5 lakh. Need MVP in 9 weeks. 3 dispatch admins and 25 technicians. India market. Around 1500 WhatsApp notifications per month.

title: CRM and form sync
requirement: Need a system that syncs website leads into HubSpot, tags them by source, and alerts sales on Slack. Budget $4k. Need it live in 4 weeks. 6 internal users. US market.

title: Payment reconciliation portal
requirement: Need an internal reconciliation dashboard that pulls payment gateway settlements, bank payouts, and invoice records. Budget Rs 7 lakh. Need launch in 10 weeks. 5 finance users. India market. Payment data involved.

clarificationAnswers.payment_flow: Internal reconciliation only, no customer checkout
clarificationAnswers.compliance_constraints: Need PCI-aware handling of payment data and audit logs

title: WhatsApp support hub
requirement: Need a small support dashboard that pulls WhatsApp messages, auto-tags conversations, and creates tickets in Freshdesk.

title: AI support triage
requirement: Need an internal support triage tool that classifies email and chat tickets, drafts replies, and hands off to Zendesk. Budget $12k. Need beta in 9 weeks. 25 agents. US market.

title: ERP and storefront sync
requirement: Need a backend sync layer that pulls products from ERP, updates Shopify stock, and pushes orders to fulfillment tools. Budget Rs 9 lakh. Need launch in 12 weeks. 8 internal ops users. India market.
